pitch: Control plane for regulated AI device fleets—route models by jurisdiction, cost, and latency with full auditability.

market.rationale: $2.5B TAM, $380M SAM and 21.7%/33.0% growth support a large market, but five mapped rivals and cloud incumbents make it competitive.

differentiation.rationale: Clear wedge in sovereignty-first control for mixed AI devices; rivals split fleet ops and model governance, though majors could bundle over time.

execution.rationale: Plan and hiring are concrete, with 75% gross margin, 8.3x LTV/CAC and 8-month payback; four model flags keep risk elevated.

timeliness.rationale: Four same-day signals show agent stack consolidation, new infra primitives and trust controls, reinforcing a current compliance-driven opening.
